'''鈭歯-ng-s-w''' ('''kanangsewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vegetablize|vegetablize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-s-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vegetablize|vegetablize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-ng-s-w
|-
! Lemma
| kanangsewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinangsewoko|thinangsewoko]] || [[word:jinangsewoko|jinangsewoko]] || [[word:shinangsewoko|shinangsewoko]] || [[word:kinangsewoko|kinangsewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunangsewoko|thuthunangsewoko]] || [[word:jujunangsewoko|jujunangsewoko]] || [[word:shushunangsewoko|shushunangsewoko]] || [[word:kukunangsewoko|kukunangsewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonangsewoko|thonangsewoko]] || [[word:jonangsewoko|jonangsewoko]] || [[word:shonangsewoko|shonangsewoko]] || [[word:konangsewoko|konangsewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nangsewoko|th忙nangsewoko]] || [[word:j忙nangsewoko|j忙nangsewoko]] || [[word:sh忙nangsewoko|sh忙nangsewoko]] || [[word:k忙nangsewoko|k忙nangsewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanangsewoko|thathanangsewoko]] || [[word:jajanangsewoko|jajanangsewoko]] || [[word:shashanangsewoko|shashanangsewoko]] || [[word:kakanangsewoko|kakanangsewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanangsewoko|thanangsewoko]] || [[word:janangsewoko|janangsewoko]] || [[word:shanangsewoko|shanangsewoko]] || [[word:kanangsewoko|kanangsewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanangsewoko|thanangsewoko]] || [[word:janangsewoko|janangsewoko]] || [[word:shanangsewoko|shanangsewoko]] || [[word:kanangsewoko|kanangsewoko]]
|}
